sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8786" key="a)nqoka/rhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-κάρηνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crowned with flowers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:235" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.235</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
